snippet.title: METLIFE
snippet.description:
MetLife, Inc. is the holding corporation for the Metropolitan Life Insurance Company (MLIC),[3] better known as MetLife, and its affiliates. MetLife is among the largest global providers of insurance, annuities, and employee benefit programs, with 90 million customers in over 60 countries.[4][5] The firm was founded on March 24, 1868.[6] MetLife ranked No. 43 in the 2018 Fortune 500 list of the largest United States corporations by total revenue.[7]

On January 6, 1915, MetLife completed the mutualization process, changing from a stock life insurance company owned by individuals to a mutual company operating without external shareholders and for the benefit of policyholders.[8] After 85 years as a mutual company, MetLife demutualized into a publicly traded company with an initial public offering in 2000.[9] Through its subsidiaries and affiliates, MetLife holds leading market positions in the United States, Japan, Latin America, Asia's Pacific region, Europe, and the Middle East.[10] MetLife serves 90 of the largest Fortune 500 companies.[11]

The company's head offices and boardroom are located at the MetLife Building at 200 Park Avenue in Midtown Manhattan and New York City which MetLife owned from 1981 to 2005; despite the sale, MetLife increased its leased footprint in the building beginning in 2015.[12][13]

In January 2016, the company announced that it would spin off its U.S. retail business, including individual life insurance and annuities for the retail market, in a separate company called Brighthouse Financial, which launched in March 2017.[14] The continuing MetLife company kept naming rights to MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey.

snippet.title: Mission Protectas - Alessandra
snippet.description:
🔴🔴🔴 Mission Protectas
Saison 2 Episode 7
Alessandra, agente de sécurité, Lugano
Nos métiers, notre fierté.

Avant de rejoindre Protectas, Alessandra était sous-chef dans un restaurant et a voulu changer de voie professionnelle. Elle a essayé d'être policière en Italie, son pays d'origine. Malheureusement, sa taille ne lui a pas permis d'y rentrer. Elle a alors rejoint Protectas dans le Tessin.

Ce qu'elle aime chez Protectas, c'est de se lever chaque matin avec le sens des responsabilités et l'envie de collaborer avec ses collègues.

***

🔴🔴 Mission Protectas
Staffel 2 Episode 7
Alessandra, Sicherheitsagentin, Lugano
Unsere Berufe, unser Stolz.

Bevor sie zu Protectas kam, war Alessandra Sous-Chefin in einem Restaurant und wollte sich beruflich verändern. Sie wollte in ihrem Heimatland Italien Polizistin werden. Leider war es ihr aufgrund ihrer Größe nicht möglich, diesen Beruf auszuführen. Daraufhin kam sie zu Protectas im Tessin.

An Protectas gefällt ihr, dass sie jeden Morgen mit Verantwortungsbewusstsein und dem Wunsch aufsteht, mit ihren Kollegen zusammenzuarbeiten.

#protectas #securitas #missionprotectas #ticino #sécurité

snippet.title: The Secret History of the MetLife Empire
snippet.description:
In this video, we'll explore the secret history of MetLife, from its beginnings in the early 20th century to its current status as one of the world's leading insurance companies.

MetLife has played a major role in the history of the United States and the world, and we'll explore its fascinating story in this video. From the Great Depression to the Cold War, MetLife has always been there to support the people and institutions of America and the world. So please join us as we explore the secret history of MetLife!

snippet.title: Diddy Chronicles | Part 2 | Episode 11 OFF-BLACK
snippet.description:
Welcome back to OFF-BLACK – and you thought part one was wild? Brace yourself because part two, featuring Khalaf, is about to take you on another rollercoaster ride through the hottest topics and some downright unfiltered opinions.

Continuing from where we left off, Saalim, David, and Khalaf wrap up the discussion on spending a week with Michael Jackson and delve into which other celebrities they'd be open to spending a day with. From A-listers to cultural icons, the crew shares their dream one-day companions.

But hold on, because the music and drama don't stop. The trio dives into the diss track that Pardison dropped on Meg Thee Stallion, and the room gets heated as they share their thoughts on the situation. You won't want to miss the unfiltered takes on this latest musical feud.

And then, it's the showdown you've been waiting for – Kanye versus Drake. The crew gets real about their preferences, comparing and contrasting the musical journeys of these two titans. From production styles to lyrical prowess, Saalim, David, and Khalaf share their insights, sparking a conversation that's sure to get you thinking.

So, whether you're on your daily commute, sipping your morning coffee, or just looking for some engaging banter, OFF-BLACK has got your back. Tune in and join the chat – let's keep it real, keep it fun, and keep it OFF-BLACK.

snippet.description:
Available on Avila: https://avilafilm.be/film/maloul-celebrates-its-destruction
Only once a year, the original inhabitants of Ma'aloul are allowed to return to their Israeli-occupied village. Khleifi documents how the history of this place lives on in the present: in the memories of the old generations and in the imagination of their children.

snippet.title: Zelensky deprived Putin's godfather Medvedchuk of citizenship of Ukraine. With Subtitles
snippet.description:
Today is a new stage of our diplomatic marathon. I told the European states’ leaders about the situation on the battlefield: the difficult situation in the Donetsk region, constant Russian attacks, the fact that Russia doesn’t count its people, doesn’t spare the locals and doesn’t stop before any criminal actions.

This can be countered only by a new level of modern military equipment that Ukraine can get from partners. I thank all the leaders who help us for understanding that now is the time for new powerful decisions. The free world has everything necessary to stop Russian aggression and bring the terrorist state to a historic defeat. It’s important for global democracy, for all those who value freedom. 

I thank everyone who helps us defend Ukraine and freedom, fights for independence and works to strengthen Ukraine! Today I’d like to pay special tribute to the warriors of the 46th separate airmobile brigade for their bravery and steadfastness in defending Soledar! Thank you, warriors!

snippet.title: 1985 09 03 SPD Reaktionen Rücktritt Schatzmeister Wischnewski - SAT.1-Reporter Wolf Achim Wiegand
snippet.description:
- Historisches Material - eingeschränkte Qualität - 

Am 3. September 1985 trat der damalige SPD-Bundesschatzmeister Hans-Jürgen Wischnewski überraschend von seinem Amt zurück. Es hatte innerparteiliche Konflikte um den Umgang mit den angespannten Parteifinanzen gegeben. Besonders SPD-Fraktionsvorsitzender Hans-Jochen Vogel hatte sich mit „Ben Wisch“ angelegt. 

Nur kurz nach dem Rücktritt sammelte ich unter SPD-Prominenten Reaktionen für die SAT.1-Nachrichtensendung „blick“. Es treten auf Horst Ehmcke, und Wolfgang Roth. 

----

Wie es zum Rücktritt kam, das berichtete damals der SPIEGEL so: 

Finsteren Blicks eilt Wischnewski in sein Bundestagsbüro. Unterwegs frotzelt ihn Fraktionsvize Volker Hauff an, der den Termin (Vorstandssitzung zu Parteifinanzen, d. A.) auch verpasste hat: »Hans-Jürgen, was ist denn mit dir los?«

Da bricht es, Vogel-Stellvertreter Hans Apel hat sich noch dazugesellt, aus Ben Wisch heraus. »Am Arsch« solle man ihn lecken, »nur Geld ausgeben« könnten alle, keiner wolle »Verantwortung übernehmen«. Und immer wieder beschwert er sich über seinen Fraktionsvorsitzenden: »Dieser Oberlehrer.« Er werde jetzt, kündigt Wischnewski an, einen »Brief an Willy« schreiben, seinen Rücktritt vom Amt des Schatzmeisters erklären und die Deutsche Presse-Agentur verständigen.

Apel rennt zum nächsten Telephon und informiert Bundesgeschäftsführer Peter Glotz: »Den müßt ihr sofort an Land ziehen, um die öffentliche Bekanntgabe zu verhindern.« Doch da war nichts mehr zu retten.

(Quelle: https://www.spiegel.de/politik/mit-nu...)

snippet.description: In the second edition of TTX Talks, Kristine Poznanski, Head of Global Business Solutions at MetLife is joined by Dr. Erin Macdonald, renowned astrophysicist, screenwriter, producer and science consultant to the entertainment industry. As the science consultant for the Star Trek franchise, Erin uses her unique background to put the ‘science’ in ‘science fiction.’ Join us for an informative and empowering conversation about how making science more accessible through pop culture can transform and inspire the next generation of leaders in STEM.

snippet.title: Sit-in devant le Palais de Justice, le Hezbollah accusé
snippet.description:
Des centaines de manifestants se sont rassemblés jeudi matin devant le Palais de justice, alors que le Conseil supérieur de la magistrature tient une réunion consacrée aux tiraillements et divergences au sein de l’appareil judiciaire. Ce rassemblement, auxquelles ont appelé les familles des victimes de l’explosion au port de Beyrouth, le 4 août 2020, intervient au lendemain de la remise en liberté des 17 détenus dans l’affaire de l’explosion par le procureur de la République, Ghassan Oueidate.

Les manifestants ont réitéré leur soutien à Tarek Bitar, chargé d’instruire l’enquête sur l’explosion, qui fait l’objet de poursuites judiciaires engagées contre lui par M. Oueidate. Les manifestants ont également dénoncé la mainmise du Hezbollah sur la justice.

Certains députés dits du changement, des Forces libanaises (FL) et du parti Kataëb se sont réunis au Palais de justice avec le ministre sortant de la Justice, Henri Khoury, à qui ils ont demandé d’intervenir à la lumière du chaos judiciaire qui frappe le pays de plein fouet. Par ailleurs, certains députés ont été molestés par les gardes du corps de M. Khoury.

Le député de Zghorta et candidat à la présidentielle, Michel Moawad, a réitéré son soutien "à la seule cause sacrée dans ce pays, celle du pouvoir judiciaire". Il a dénoncé "le système d’impunité qui conduit à davantage de répressions et à l’émergence d’un État policier".

De son côté, le député FL de Zahlé, Georges Okais, a souligné que "certains partis politiques manipulent la justice pour paralyser ce qui reste des institutions". "Seul le juge d’instruction Tarek Bitar est en charge du dossier de l’enquête sur l’explosion au port de Beyrouth", a-t-il insisté, soulignant que "les juges qui interfèrent dans ce dossier enfreignent la loi". "Le Hezbollah et le Courant patriotique libre (CPL) cherchent à entraver le cours de l’enquête. Ils ont peur que la vérité ne soit dévoilée", a encore dénoncé M. Okais.

"Nous avons le rôle et le devoir de nous tenir aux côtés des familles des victimes, sinon les milices continueront à imposer leur diktat sur le pays", a signalé le député Mark Daou. Le député Melhem Khalaf, ancien bâtonnier de Beyrouth, a appelé "les autorités religieuses à intervenir dans l’immédiat pour sauver les Libanais de cette situation lamentable". Le député de Beyrouth a interrompu jeudi le sit-in qu’il observait avec des collègues au Parlement pour protester contre la non-élection d’un président de la République. "Le Liban est entre les mains de dictatures confessionnelles, où la loi n’est pas appliquée", a-t-il martelé, soulignant que les deux entités favorables à ces dictatures sont "un juge et un responsable de la sécurité".

Par Nada El Kurdi

snippet.title: 2023 Briefing: Michael Bociurkiw, Nima Elbagir, Karoline Kan, Roland Oliphant & Anne McElvoy
snippet.description:
2022 was certainly an interesting year. Global dynamics shifted, politics and parties were questioned and war broke out on multiple battlefields. As we begin a new year, join us for an expert analysis session exploring the latest world news events and what emerging trends we should be looking out for in 2023. Moderated by acclaimed global affairs analyst Michael Bociurkiw, we will be bringing together foreign correspondents and experts to provide insight into what is really happening on the global agenda.

Presented in collaboration with On Front Line.

Michael Bociurkiw is a global affairs analyst, speaker and journalist, and the author of Digital Pandemic: How tech went from bad to good. In January 2022, he became a senior fellow at the Washington, DC-based Atlantic Council, attached to its Eurasia Center.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           

Speakers:

Nima Elbagir is a Sudanese-born journalist and an award-winning international television correspondent. She joined CNN as a London-based International Investigative Correspondent. In 2008, she picked up two Foreign Press Association Awards – TV News Story of the Year and Broadcast Journalist of the Year.       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Karoline Kan is the author of Under Red Skies: Three Generations of Life, Loss and Hope in China, previously Bloomberg Environment Correspondent and editor of China Dialogue.     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Roland Oliphant is the Telegraph’s Senior Foreign Correspondent.             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Jon Lee Anderson is an American biographer, author, investigative reporter, war correspondent, and staff writer for The New Yorker.                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Anne McElvoy is an Executive Editor for The Economist and a columnist for the Evening Standard.

snippet.title: 🔥 MetLife Life Insurance Review: A Shield for Your Loved Ones, Yet Not Without Considerations
snippet.description:
MetLife Life Insurance stands tall as a reliable shield, offering a safety net for the financial well-being of your loved ones in the face of life's uncertainties. With a plethora of coverage options and a legacy of trust, MetLife undoubtedly has several appealing aspects, but it's not without some points that require thoughtful contemplation.

One of the standout positives of MetLife Life Insurance is the sheer variety of policies available to cater to diverse needs and preferences. Whether you're seeking a term life insurance plan for temporary coverage or a permanent life insurance policy for lifelong protection, MetLife's extensive selection ensures you can find a fitting solution to safeguard your family's future.

Furthermore, MetLife's financial strength and longstanding reputation inspire confidence among policyholders. With a solid track record of fulfilling claims and providing financial security to beneficiaries, the company has earned its place as a reliable partner during life's pivotal moments. This assurance of timely payouts allows policyholders to rest easy, knowing their loved ones will be well taken care of in the event of the unthinkable.

MetLife's policy features, such as optional riders and add-ons, are another compelling advantage. These additional provisions allow policyholders to tailor their coverage according to specific needs. Whether it's adding critical illness coverage or enhancing disability benefits, these riders offer an extra layer of protection, giving policyholders more control over their insurance plans.

However, one aspect that potential policyholders should consider is the possibility of higher premiums with MetLife Life Insurance. While the company's policies are known for their comprehensive coverage, the cost may be a deciding factor for some individuals or families on a tight budget. Shopping around and obtaining quotes from multiple insurance providers is essential to ensure you strike the right balance between coverage and affordability.

Additionally, some policyholders have reported mixed experiences with MetLife's customer service. While many have had positive interactions and seamless assistance, others have expressed frustration with delays in claim processing or difficulty in reaching representatives. Addressing customer service concerns and improving responsiveness could enhance the overall experience for policyholders.

Furthermore, MetLife's underwriting process may present challenges for individuals with certain pre-existing health conditions. While stringent underwriting criteria can help maintain the company's financial stability, it might result in coverage denials for some applicants. Exploring alternative insurance providers with more lenient underwriting guidelines may be a prudent step for those facing health-related obstacles.

In conclusion, MetLife Life Insurance offers a diverse range of coverage options and a strong reputation in the insurance landscape, making it an appealing choice for protecting your family's financial future. The ability to customize policies with various riders adds value, allowing individuals to tailor their coverage according to specific needs. However, prospective policyholders should be mindful of potential higher premiums, customer service considerations, and underwriting criteria when evaluating MetLife as their life insurance provider. By carefully weighing the pros and cons, you can make an informed decision that aligns with your family's long-term security.

snippet.title: Truth Tellers: The Sir Harry Evans Global Summit in Investigative Journalism
snippet.description:
Live from the Royal Institute of British Architects in London: 
Wednesday 10 May 2023
09:30 - 19:15 GMT

The inaugural Sir Harry Evans Global Summit in Investigative Journalism, is hosted by Reuters Editor-in-Chief Alessandra Galloni, Durham University Vice Chancellor Karen O’Brien, and Evans’ wife, Tina Brown CBE. 

The summit will bring together the world’s most dogged and diverse truth-seekers, both seasoned and innovative: unsung reporters who risk their lives and reputations, intrepid war photographers, digital data sleuths, relentless documentarians, and enterprising investigators in podcasting, publishing, TV, and streaming media.

Speakers include some of the most influential journalists of our time, including: Bob Woodward, Carl Bernstein, Emily Maitlis, Dean Baquet, Adrees Latif, Anabel Hernández, Nick Davies, Alex Crawford,  Roula Khalaf, Bill Browder, Maria Pevchikh, Madhumita Murgia, Sir Michael Moritz, Deborah Turness, Fisayo Soyombo, Barry Diller, Amol Rajan, Marianna Spring, Patrick Radden Keefe, Pia Sarma, Ed Williams, David Thomson, Katharine Viner, Andrew Marr, Mikhail Zygar, Selam Gebrekidan, Sir Simon Schama, Lynsey Addario, Steve Hasker, John Ryley, Masih Alinejad, Paul Caruana Galizia, David Walmsley, Laurent Richard, Sandrine Rigaud, James Naughtie, Robert Trafford, Branko Brkic, Yalda Hakim, Bradley Hope, Mark Stephens, Maurice Tamman, Clarissa Ward, Waylon Cunningham and Tortoise’s own Paul Caruana Galizia and  James Harding.
